channel.description: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) Policy Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) RED: Prohibited YELLOW: Limited GREEN: Encouraged Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) RED: Prohibited Develop your skills Assess your learning Violations: Grade of 0 and Honor Council Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) YELLOW: Limited Use GenAI in a limited way to complete a task or achieve a goal Still majority your own work Citations Required! No Direct AI Results! Violations: Grade of 0 and Honor Council Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) GREEN: Encouraged
